children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: An order issued by the Secretary under shall contain the terms and conditions described in this section and, except as provided in , no other terms or conditions.section 6203(a) of this titlesection 6205 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: 3 members who are producers and who are not exempt from an assessment under subsection (d)(5)(A);

children.label: B
children.text: 3 members who are importers and who are not exempt from an assessment under subsection (d)(5)(A); and

children.label: C
children.text: one member appointed from the general public.

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: A Appointment
children.text: The Secretary shall appoint the members of the Board.

children.heading: Producers
children.label: B Producers
children.text: The 3 members who are producers shall be appointed from individuals nominated by lime producers.

children.heading: Importers
children.label: C Importers
children.text: The 3 members who are importers shall be appointed from individuals nominated by lime importers.

children.heading: Public
children.label: D Public
children.text: The public representative shall be appointed from nominations of the Board.

children.heading: Failure to nominate
children.label: E Failure to nominate
children.text: If producers and importers fail to nominate individuals for appointment, the Secretary may appoint members on a basis provided for in the order. If the Board fails to nominate a public representative, such member may be appointed by the Secretary without a nomination.

children.heading: Initial Board
children.label: F Initial Board
children.text: The Secretary shall establish an initial Board from among nominations solicited by the Secretary. For the purpose of obtaining nominations for the members of the initial Board described in paragraph (1), the Secretary shall perform the functions of the Board under this subsection as the Secretary determines necessary and appropriate. The Secretary shall terminate the initial Board established under this subsection as soon as practicable after .December 14, 1993

children.heading: Board allocation
children.label: G Board allocation
children.text: The producer and importer representation on the Board shall be allocated on the basis of 2 producer members and 1 importer member from the district east of the Mississippi River and 1 producer member and 2 importer members from the district west of the Mississippi River.

children.label: A
children.text: be appointed in the same manner as the member for whom such individual is an alternate; and

children.label: B
children.text: serve on the Board if such member is absent from a meeting or is disqualified under paragraph (5).

children.label: A
children.text: 2 members shall be appointed for a term of 1 year;

children.label: B
children.text: 2 members shall be appointed for a term of 2 years; and

children.label: C
children.text: 3 members shall be appointed for a term of 3 years;

children.heading: Replacement
children.label: 5 Replacement
children.text: If a member or alternate of the Board who was appointed as a producer, importer, or public representative ceases to belong to the group for which such member was appointed, such member or alternate shall be disqualified from serving on the Board.

children.heading: Compensation
children.label: 6 Compensation
children.text: Members and alternates of the Board shall serve without pay.

children.heading: Travel expenses
children.label: 7 Travel expenses
children.text: While away from their homes or regular places of business in the performance of duties for the Board, members and alternates shall be allowed travel expenses, including a per diem allowance in lieu of subsistence, in the same manner as persons employed intermittently in Government service are allowed travel expenses under .section 5703 of title 5

children.label: A
children.text: administer orders issued by the Secretary under , and amendments to such orders, in accordance with their terms and provisions and consistent with this chapter;section 6203(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: prescribe rules and regulations to effectuate the terms and provisions of such orders;

children.label: C
children.text: receive, investigate, and report to the Secretary accounts of violations of such orders;

children.label: D
children.text: make recommendations to the Secretary with respect to amendments that should be made to such orders; and

children.label: E
children.text: employ a manager and staff.

children.heading: Budgets
children.label: 1 Budgets
children.text: The Board shall prepare and submit to the Secretary a budget (on a fiscal period basis determined by the Secretary) of the anticipated expenses and disbursements of the Board in the administration of the order, including probable costs of research, promotion, and consumer information. A budget shall take effect on the approval of the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: the development and carrying out of such plan; and

children.label: B
children.text: the payment of the cost of such plan with funds collected pursuant to this chapter.

children.heading: Rate
children.label: 1 Rate
children.text: The assessment rate shall not exceed $.01 per pound of limes.

children.label: A
children.text: be responsible for the collection from the producer, and payment to the Board, of assessments under this subsection; and

children.label: B
children.text: maintain a separate record of the limes of each producer whose limes are so handled, including the limes owned by the handler.

children.heading: Producer-handlers
children.label: 3 Producer-handlers
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (2), a producer-handler shall be considered the first handler of limes produced by such producer-handler.

children.heading: Importers
children.label: 4 Importers
children.text: The assessment on imported limes shall be paid by the importer at the time of entry into the United States and shall be remitted to the Board.

children.label: A
children.text: a producer who produces less than 200,000 pounds of limes per year;

children.label: B
children.text: a producer-handler who produces and handles less than 200,000 pounds of limes per year; and

children.label: C
children.text: an importer who imports less than 200,000 pounds of limes per year.

children.label: A
children.text: stating the basis for such exemption; and

children.label: B
children.text: certifying that such person will not exceed the limitation required for such exemption in such year.

children.label: i
children.text: pay for research, promotion, and consumer information described in the budget of the Board under subsection (c) and for other expenses incurred by the Board in the administration of an order;

children.label: ii
children.text: pay such other expenses for the administration, maintenance, and functioning of the Board as may be authorized by the Secretary; and

children.label: iii
children.text: fund a reserve established under ; andsection 6205(4) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: shall be used to pay the expenses incurred by the Secretary, including salaries and expenses of Government employees in implementing and administering the order, except as provided in paragraph (2).

children.heading: Referenda
children.label: 2 Referenda
children.text: Such order shall provide that the Board shall reimburse the Secretary, from assessments collected under subsection (d), for any expenses incurred by the Secretary in conducting referenda under this chapter, except for the salaries of Government employees.
any false or unwarranted claims on behalf of limes; and
any false or unwarranted statements with respect to the attributes or use of any product that competes with limes for sale in commerce.

children.heading: Prohibition on use of funds
children.label: g Prohibition on use of funds
children.text: Such order shall provide that funds collected by the Board under this chapter through assessments authorized by this chapter may not, in any manner, be used for the purpose of influencing legislation or governmental policy or action, except for making recommendations to the Secretary as provided for in this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: to maintain books and records with respect to the receipt and disbursement of funds received by the Board;

children.label: B
children.text: to submit to the Secretary from time to time such reports as the Secretary may require for appropriate accounting; and

children.label: C
children.text: to submit to the Secretary at the end of each fiscal year a complete audit report regarding the activities of the Board during such fiscal year.

children.label: A
children.text: to maintain and make available for inspection by the employees of the Board and the Secretary such books and records as may be required by the order; and

children.label: B
children.text: to file, at the times, in the manner, and having the content prescribed by the order, reports regarding the collection, payment, or remittance of such assessments.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Such order shall require that all information obtained pursuant to subsection (h)(2) shall be kept confidential by all officers and employees of the Department and of the Board. Only such information as the Secretary considers relevant shall be disclosed to the public and only in a suit or administrative hearing, brought at the request of the Secretary or to which the Secretary or any officer of the United States is a party, involving the order with respect to which the information was furnished or acquired.

children.label: A
children.text: issuance of general statements based on the reports of a number of handlers, producer-handlers, and importers subject to an order, if the statements do not identify the information furnished by any person; or

children.label: B
children.text: the publication by direction of the Secretary, of the name of any person violating an order issued under , together with a statement of the particular provisions of the order violated by such person.section 6203(a) of this title

children.heading: Withholding information
children.label: j Withholding information
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to authorize the withholding of information from Congress.
